<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<meta name="color-scheme" content="dark">
<title>Ahmed Mostafa Megahed — Flutter Developer</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Mono:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=Syne:wght@400;600;700;800&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --bg: #050508;
    --bg2: #0c0c14;
    --glass: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
    --glass-border: rgba(255,255,255,0.09);
    --neon: #4f8eff;
    --neon2: #a259ff;
    --neon3: #00e5ff;
    --accent: #ff6b6b;
    --text: #e8eaf0;
    --muted: #9098b8;
    --card: rgba(12,12,22,0.85);
    --glow: 0 0 30px rgba(79,142,255,0.2);
    --glow2: 0 0 30px rgba(162,89,255,0.2);
  }
  *,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
  html{
    scroll-behavior:smooth;font-size:16px;
    background:#050508;
    color-scheme:dark;
  }
  body{
    background:var(--bg) !important;
    background-color:#050508 !important;
    color:var(--text) !important;
    color:#e8eaf0 !important;
    font-family:'Outfit',sans-serif;
    overflow-x:hidden;
    cursor:none;
  }

  /* ── LOADER ── */
  #loader{
    position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9999;
    background:#050508;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    flex-direction:column;gap:20px;
    transition:opacity .8s ease, visibility .8s ease;
  }
  #loader.hide{opacity:0;visibility:hidden;}
  .loader-logo{
    font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:4rem;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--neon),var(--neon2));
    -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;
    animation:pulse-logo 1s ease infinite alternate;
  }
  .loader-bar{
    width:200px;height:2px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;
  }
  .loader-fill{
    height:100%;width:0;
    background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--neon),var(--neon2));
    animation:fill-bar 2s ease forwards;
  }
  @keyframes fill-bar{to{width:100%;}}
  @keyframes pulse-logo{from{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(79,142,255,.6));}to{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 24px rgba(162,89,255,.9));}}

  /* ── CURSOR ── */
  #cursor{
    position:fixed;top:0;left:0;z-index:10000;pointer-events:none;
    width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--neon);
    transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
    transition:transform .1s ease, background .2s ease, width .2s ease, height .2s ease;
    mix-blend-mode:screen;
  }
  #cursor-ring{
    position:fixed;top:0;left:0;z-index:9999;pointer-events:none;
    width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;
    border:1.5px solid rgba(79,142,255,0.5);
    transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
    transition:transform .25s ease, width .2s ease, height .2s ease, border-color .2s ease;
  }
  body.hovering #cursor{width:6px;height:6px;background:var(--neon2);}
  body.hovering #cursor-ring{width:50px;height:50px;border-color:rgba(162,89,255,0.7);}

  /* ── CANVAS ── */
  #particles{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;}

  /* ── NAVBAR ── */
  nav{
    position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:1000;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
    padding:1.2rem 4rem;
    backdrop-filter:blur(20px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(20px);
    background:rgba(5,5,8,0.92);
    border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
    transition:all .3s ease;
  }
  .nav-logo{
    font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:1.3rem;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--neon),var(--neon2));
    -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;
    text-decoration:none;
  }
  .nav-links{display:flex;gap:2.5rem;list-style:none;}
  .nav-links a{
    color:var(--muted);font-size:.9rem;font-weight:500;
    text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:.04em;
    transition:color .2s ease;position:relative;
  }
  .nav-links a::after{
    content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-4px;left:0;right:100%;height:1px;
    background:var(--neon);transition:right .3s ease;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover{color:var(--text);}
  .nav-links a:hover::after,.nav-links a.active::after{right:0;}
  .nav-links a.active{color:var(--neon);}
  .hamburger{display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;cursor:none;padding:4px;}
  .hamburger span{display:block;width:24px;height:2px;background:var(--text);transition:.3s;}

  /* ── HERO ── */
  #hero{
    position:relative;z-index:1;
    min-height:100vh;
    display:flex;align-items:center;
    padding:0 4rem;
    gap:4rem;
  }
  .hero-left{flex:1;max-width:680px;}
  .hero-badge{
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;
    padding:.45rem 1.1rem;border-radius:100px;
    border:1px solid rgba(79,142,255,0.3);
    background:rgba(79,142,255,0.06);
    font-size:.8rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--neon);
    margin-bottom:1.8rem;
    animation:fadeUp .8s ease .5s both;
  }
  .hero-badge::before{
    content:'';width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--neon);animation:blink 1.4s ease infinite;
  }
  @keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:.3;}}
  .hero-name{
    font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:800;
    font-size:clamp(2.8rem,6vw,5rem);line-height:1.05;
    margin-bottom:1rem;
    animation:fadeUp .8s ease .7s both;
  }
  .shimmer-text{
    background:linear-gradient(90deg,
      var(--neon) 0%,
      var(--neon2) 25%,
      var(--neon3) 50%,
      var(--neon2) 75%,
      var(--neon) 100%);
    background-size:200% auto;
    -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;
    animation:shimmer 4s linear infinite;
  }
  @keyframes shimmer{to{background-position:200% center;}}
  .hero-role{
    font-size:1.4rem;color:var(--muted);font-weight:300;margin-bottom:1.4rem;
    animation:fadeUp .8s ease .9s both;
  }
  .hero-tagline{
    font-size:1.05rem;line-height:1.7;color:#9098b8;
    max-width:520px;margin-bottom:2.5rem;
    animation:fadeUp .8s ease 1.1s both;
  }
  .hero-btns{display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;animation:fadeUp .8s ease 1.3s both;}
  .btn{
    padding:.85rem 2rem;border-radius:12px;font-size:.95rem;font-weight:600;
    text-decoration:none;cursor:none;transition:all .25s ease;
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;
    font-family:'Outfit',sans-serif;
  }
  .btn-primary{
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--neon),var(--neon2));
    color:#fff;border:1px solid transparent;
    box-shadow:0 0 24px rgba(79,142,255,0.3);
  }
  .btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(79,142,255,0.5);}
  .btn-outline{
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);color:#e8eaf0;
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
  }
  .btn-outline:hover{border-color:var(--neon);color:var(--neon);background:rgba(79,142,255,0.05);transform:translateY(-2px);}

  .hero-right{
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    flex:0 0 auto;
    animation:fadeUp .8s ease 1.5s both;
  }
  .avatar-wrap{position:relative;width:310px;height:340px;}
  .avatar-ripple{
    position:absolute;inset:0;border-radius:46%;
    border:1px solid rgba(79,142,255,0.4);
    animation:ripple 2s ease-out infinite;
  }
  .avatar-ripple:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.7s;border-color:rgba(162,89,255,0.3);}
  .avatar-ripple:nth-child(3){animation-delay:1.4s;border-color:rgba(0,229,255,0.2);}
  @keyframes ripple{
    0%{transform:scale(1);opacity:.8;}
    100%{transform:scale(1.6);opacity:0;}
  }
  /* photo frame */
  .avatar-photo-frame{
    position:absolute;inset:14px;
    animation:float-avatar 5s ease-in-out infinite;
    z-index:2;
  }
  @keyframes float-avatar{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(-14px);}}
  .avatar-glow-ring{
    position:absolute;inset:-8px;border-radius:50%;
    background:conic-gradient(from 0deg, var(--neon), var(--neon2), var(--neon3), var(--neon2), var(--neon));
    animation:spin-ring 4s linear infinite;
    border-radius:46%;
    z-index:0;
  }
  @keyframes spin-ring{to{transform:rotate(360deg);}}
  .avatar-photo-border{
    position:absolute;inset:3px;border-radius:46%;
    background:#050508;
    z-index:1;overflow:hidden;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  }
  .avatar-photo-img{
    width:100%;
    height:100%;
    object-fit:cover;
    object-position:center 18%;
    display:block;
    filter:brightness(1.05) contrast(1.03);
    transform:scale(1.08);
    transform-origin:center 20%;
  }
  .avatar-status-badge{
    position:absolute;bottom:-6px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;
    padding:.3rem .9rem;border-radius:100px;
    background:rgba(12,12,22,0.95);
    border:1px solid rgba(79,142,255,0.4);
    color:#e8eaf0;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;
    letter-spacing:.04em;white-space:nowrap;
    box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5),0 0 16px rgba(79,142,255,0.2);
    z-index:10;
  }
  .avatar-status-dot{
    width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;
    background:#22c55e;flex-shrink:0;
    box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(34,197,94,0.8);
    animation:blink 1.4s ease infinite;
  }

  /* ── SCROLL INDICATOR ── */
  .scroll-hint{
    position:absolute;bottom:2rem;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;
    color:var(--muted);font-size:.75rem;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;
    animation:fadeUp .8s ease 2s both;
  }
  .scroll-hint-line{
    width:1px;height:40px;
    background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--neon),transparent);
    animation:scroll-line 2s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes scroll-line{0%,100%{transform:scaleY(1);}50%{transform:scaleY(.5);}}

  /* ── SECTIONS BASE ── */
  section{position:relative;z-index:1;padding:7rem 4rem;}
  .section-label{
    font-size:.78rem;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--neon);font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;
    margin-bottom:1rem;
  }
  .section-title{
    font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:800;
    font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3rem);line-height:1.1;
    margin-bottom:1rem;
  }
  .section-sub{color:var(--muted);font-size:1rem;line-height:1.7;max-width:560px;margin-bottom:3.5rem;}
  .divider{
    width:60px;height:3px;border-radius:2px;
    background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--neon),var(--neon2));
    margin:1rem 0 2rem;
  }

  /* ── ABOUT ── */
  #about{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:5rem;align-items:center;}
  .about-text p{color:#9098b8;line-height:1.85;font-size:1rem;margin-bottom:1.2rem;}
  .about-highlights{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem;margin-top:2rem;}
  .highlight-item{
    display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:1rem;
    padding:1rem 1.2rem;border-radius:12px;
    background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    transition:all .25s ease;
  }
  .highlight-item:hover{border-color:rgba(79,142,255,0.3);background:rgba(79,142,255,0.05);}
  .highlight-icon{font-size:1.3rem;flex-shrink:0;}
  .highlight-item h4{font-size:.92rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.2rem;}
  .highlight-item p{font-size:.83rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5;margin:0;}

  .about-visual{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
  .about-card-3d{
    width:100%;max-width:340px;padding:2.2rem;
    border-radius:20px;
    background:var(--card);
    border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    backdrop-filter:blur(20px);
    box-shadow:0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5),0 0 40px rgba(79,142,255,0.08);
    transition:transform .1s ease;
    transform-style:preserve-3d;
  }
  .about-card-3d .ac-header{display:flex;gap:1rem;align-items:center;margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
  .ac-avatar{
    width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:12px;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--neon),var(--neon2));
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:1.1rem;color:#fff;
    flex-shrink:0;
  }
  .ac-name{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:.98rem;}
  .ac-role{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--neon);font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;}
  .ac-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:.8rem;margin-top:1.2rem;}
  .ac-stat{
    padding:.9rem;border-radius:10px;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02);
    border:1px solid var(--glass-border);text-align:center;
  }
  .ac-stat-val{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:1.5rem;color:var(--neon);}
  .ac-stat-label{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:.2rem;}
  .ac-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;margin-top:1.2rem;}
  .ac-tag{
    padding:.3rem .75rem;border-radius:100px;font-size:.72rem;
    background:rgba(79,142,255,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(79,142,255,0.2);color:var(--neon);
  }

  /* ── SKILLS ── */
  #skills{background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent,rgba(79,142,255,0.02),transparent);}
  .skills-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2rem;}
  .skill-category{
    padding:2rem;border-radius:16px;
    background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
    transition:border-color .3s ease, transform .3s ease;
  }
  .skill-category:hover{border-color:rgba(79,142,255,0.25);transform:translateY(-4px);}
  .skill-cat-title{
    font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:1rem;
    margin-bottom:.4rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;
  }
  .skill-cat-title span{font-size:1.2rem;}
  .skill-cat-sub{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:1.6rem;}
  .skill-item{margin-bottom:1.2rem;}
  .skill-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:.5rem;}
  .skill-name{font-size:.88rem;font-weight:500;}
  .skill-pct{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--neon);font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;}
  .skill-track{
    height:4px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;
  }
  .skill-bar{
    height:100%;width:0;border-radius:4px;
    background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--neon),var(--neon2));
    transition:width 1.2s cubic-bezier(.25,.8,.25,1);
    box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(79,142,255,0.4);
  }

  /* ── PROJECTS ── */
  .projects-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:2rem;}
  .project-card{
    padding:2rem;border-radius:16px;
    background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
    transition:all .3s ease;
    position:relative;overflow:hidden;
    transform-style:preserve-3d;
  }
  .project-card::before{
    content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
    background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 0%,rgba(79,142,255,0.08),transparent 70%);
    opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s ease;
  }
  .project-card:hover{border-color:rgba(79,142,255,0.3);transform:translateY(-6px) rotateX(2deg);box-shadow:0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5),0 0 40px rgba(79,142,255,0.1);}
  .project-card:hover::before{opacity:1;}
  .project-num{
    font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.72rem;color:var(--neon);
    margin-bottom:1rem;opacity:.6;
  }
  .project-title{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:1.25rem;margin-bottom:.7rem;}
  .project-desc{font-size:.88rem;color:#9098b8;line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:1.2rem;}
  .project-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.4rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
  .tag{
    padding:.25rem .7rem;border-radius:100px;font-size:.72rem;
    background:rgba(162,89,255,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(162,89,255,0.2);color:var(--neon2);
  }
  .project-link{
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;
    color:var(--muted);font-size:.82rem;text-decoration:none;font-weight:500;
    transition:color .2s ease;cursor:none;
  }
  .project-link:hover{color:var(--neon);}
  .project-link svg{transition:transform .2s ease;}
  .project-link:hover svg{transform:translate(2px,-2px);}

  /* ── MARQUEE ── */
  .marquee-wrap{overflow:hidden;padding:2rem 0;border-top:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border);margin:2rem 0;}
  .marquee-track{
    display:flex;gap:3rem;width:max-content;
    animation:marquee 25s linear infinite;
  }
  .marquee-track:hover{animation-play-state:paused;}
  @keyframes marquee{to{transform:translateX(-50%);}}
  .marquee-item{
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;
    white-space:nowrap;color:var(--muted);font-size:.88rem;font-weight:500;
    padding:.3rem 1rem;border-radius:100px;
    background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    transition:all .2s ease;
  }
  .marquee-item:hover{color:var(--neon);border-color:rgba(79,142,255,0.3);}
  .marquee-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--neon);flex-shrink:0;}

  /* ── CONTENT CREATION ── */
  #content{
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(162,89,255,0.04),transparent,rgba(79,142,255,0.04));
  }
  .content-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:4rem;align-items:center;}
  .counter-row{display:flex;gap:2rem;margin:2rem 0;}
  .counter-box{
    padding:1.5rem 2rem;border-radius:16px;
    background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    text-align:center;flex:1;
    transition:all .3s ease;
  }
  .counter-box:hover{border-color:rgba(162,89,255,0.3);transform:translateY(-4px);}
  .counter-val{
    font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:2.2rem;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--neon2),var(--neon));
    -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;
  }
  .counter-label{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:.3rem;}
  .platform-cards{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem;}
  .platform-card{
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;
    padding:1rem 1.4rem;border-radius:12px;
    background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    transition:all .25s ease;cursor:none;
  }
  .platform-card:hover{border-color:rgba(79,142,255,0.3);transform:translateX(4px);}
  .platform-icon{
    width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:10px;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    font-size:1.2rem;flex-shrink:0;
  }
  .platform-icon.yt{background:rgba(255,0,0,0.1);}
  .platform-icon.tt{background:rgba(0,229,255,0.1);}
  .platform-name{font-weight:600;font-size:.92rem;}
  .platform-desc{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);}

  /* ── EDUCATION ── */
  .timeline{position:relative;padding-left:2rem;}
  .timeline::before{
    content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:1px;
    background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--neon),var(--neon2),transparent);
  }
  .timeline-item{
    position:relative;margin-bottom:2.5rem;
    padding:1.8rem 2rem;border-radius:16px;
    background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    transition:all .3s ease;
  }
  .timeline-item:hover{border-color:rgba(79,142,255,0.3);transform:translateX(4px);}
  .timeline-item::before{
    content:'';position:absolute;left:-2rem;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);
    width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:50%;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--neon),var(--neon2));
    box-shadow:0 0 16px rgba(79,142,255,0.5);
  }
  .tl-year{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.75rem;color:var(--neon);margin-bottom:.5rem;}
  .tl-title{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:1.1rem;margin-bottom:.3rem;}
  .tl-sub{font-size:.88rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:.5rem;}
  .tl-gpa{
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;
    padding:.25rem .8rem;border-radius:100px;font-size:.75rem;
    background:rgba(79,142,255,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(79,142,255,0.2);color:var(--neon);
    font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;
  }

  /* ── CERTS ── */
  .certs-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.5rem;}
  .cert-card{
    padding:1.8rem;border-radius:16px;
    background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    transition:all .3s ease;text-align:center;
  }
  .cert-card:hover{border-color:rgba(162,89,255,0.3);transform:translateY(-6px);box-shadow:0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.4),0 0 30px rgba(162,89,255,0.1);}
  .cert-icon{font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:1rem;}
  .cert-title{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:1rem;margin-bottom:.4rem;}
  .cert-org{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--neon2);}

  /* ── CONTACT ── */
  #contact{
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(79,142,255,0.04),transparent,rgba(162,89,255,0.04));
  }
  .contact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:5rem;align-items:start;}
  .contact-items{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:2rem;}
  .contact-item{
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1.2rem;
    padding:1rem 1.4rem;border-radius:12px;
    background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    text-decoration:none;color:#e8eaf0;
    transition:all .25s ease;cursor:none;
    position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  }
  .contact-item::before{
    content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:3px;
    background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--neon),var(--neon2));
    opacity:0;transition:opacity .25s ease;
  }
  .contact-item:hover{border-color:rgba(79,142,255,0.3);transform:translateX(4px);}
  .contact-item:hover::before{opacity:1;}
  .contact-icon{
    width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:10px;
    background:rgba(79,142,255,0.1);
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    font-size:1.1rem;flex-shrink:0;
    transition:all .25s ease;
  }
  .contact-item:hover .contact-icon{background:rgba(79,142,255,0.2);}
  .contact-label{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:.1rem;}
  .contact-val{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:500;}
  .copy-btn{
    margin-left:auto;padding:.25rem .6rem;border-radius:6px;
    background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    color:var(--muted);font-size:.7rem;cursor:none;
    transition:all .2s ease;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;
  }
  .copy-btn:hover{border-color:var(--neon);color:var(--neon);}
  .copy-btn.copied{border-color:var(--neon3);color:var(--neon3);}

  .socials-title{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:1.1rem;margin-bottom:1.2rem;}
  .socials-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:.8rem;}
  .social-btn{
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.8rem;
    padding:.9rem 1.2rem;border-radius:12px;
    background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    color:#e8eaf0;text-decoration:none;font-size:.88rem;font-weight:500;
    transition:all .25s ease;cursor:none;
  }
  .social-btn:hover{border-color:rgba(79,142,255,0.4);color:var(--neon);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 12px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.3),0 0 20px rgba(79,142,255,0.1);}
  .social-icon{font-size:1.2rem;}

  /* ── BACK TO TOP ── */
  #back-top{
    position:fixed;bottom:2rem;right:2rem;z-index:100;
    width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:12px;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--neon),var(--neon2));
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    cursor:none;
    transform:translateY(80px);opacity:0;
    transition:all .3s ease;
    box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(79,142,255,0.3);
  }
  #back-top.visible{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1;}
  #back-top:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(79,142,255,0.5);}
  #back-top svg{color:#fff;}

  /* ── FOOTER ── */
  footer{
    text-align:center;padding:3rem 4rem 2rem;
    border-top:1px solid var(--glass-border);
    color:var(--muted);font-size:.82rem;
    position:relative;z-index:1;
  }
  footer span{color:var(--neon);}

  /* ── REVEAL ANIMATIONS ── */
  .reveal{opacity:0;transition:opacity .8s ease, transform .8s ease;}
  .reveal.fade-up{transform:translateY(40px);}
  .reveal.slide-left{transform:translateX(-50px);}
  .reveal.slide-right{transform:translateX(50px);}
  .reveal.visible{opacity:1;transform:none;}

  /* ── DARK MODE REINFORCEMENT (prevents any browser default override) ── */
  html, body {
    background-color: #050508 !important;
    color: #e8eaf0 !important;
  }
  /* Ensure all card/glass surfaces render dark */
  .skill-category, .project-card, .timeline-item, .cert-card,
  .platform-card, .counter-box, .contact-item, .social-btn,
  .about-card-3d, .highlight-item, .ac-stat {
    background-color: rgba(12,12,22,0.85);
    color: #e8eaf0;
  }
  /* Explicit text colour for key elements */
  .project-title, .tl-title, .cert-title, .platform-name,
  .skill-name, .ac-name, .contact-val, .socials-title,
  h1, h2, h3, h4, .section-title {
    color: #e8eaf0;
  }
  .section-sub, .skill-cat-sub, .highlight-item p, .tl-sub,
  .platform-desc, .counter-label, .contact-label,
  .copy-btn, .project-link {
    color: #9098b8;
  }

  @keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(30px);}to{opacity:1;transform:none;}}

  /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
  @media(max-width:1024px){
    #experience .timeline{padding-left:1.5rem;}
    #about{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .about-visual{display:none;}
    .skills-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
    .projects-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .content-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .contact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .certs-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  }
  @media(max-width:768px){
    #experience .timeline{padding-left:1.2rem;}
    nav{padding:1rem 1.5rem;}
    .nav-links{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;top:64px;background:rgba(5,5,8,.97);flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:2.5rem;z-index:999;}
    .nav-links.open{display:flex;}
    .hamburger{display:flex;}
    #hero{flex-direction:column;padding:6rem 1.5rem 3rem;text-align:center;gap:3rem;}
    .hero-btns{justify-content:center;}
    section{padding:5rem 1.5rem;}
    .skills-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    div[style*="grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)"]{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr) !important;}
    .certs-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .counter-row{flex-direction:column;}
    .socials-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- LOADER -->
<div id="loader">
  <div class="loader-logo">AM</div>
  <div class="loader-bar"><div class="loader-fill"></div></div>
</div>

<!-- CURSOR -->
<div id="cursor"></div>
<div id="cursor-ring"></div>

<!-- PARTICLES CANVAS -->
<canvas id="particles"></canvas>

<!-- NAVBAR -->
<nav id="navbar">
  <a href="#hero" class="nav-logo">Ahmed.dev</a>
  <ul class="nav-links" id="navLinks">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#skills">Skills</a></li>
    <li><a href="#experience">Experience</a></li>
    <li><a href="#projects">Projects</a></li>
    <li><a href="#content">Content</a></li>
    <li><a href="#education">Education</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
  <button class="hamburger" id="hamburger" aria-label="Menu">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </button>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-left">
    <div class="hero-badge">⚡ Available for opportunities</div>
    <h1 class="hero-name">
      <span class="shimmer-text">AHMED</span><br>
      <span class="shimmer-text">MOSTAFA</span><br>
      <span class="shimmer-text">MEGAHED</span>
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-role">Flutter Developer · Mobile Application Developer</p>
    <p class="hero-tagline">6+ cross-platform apps shipped. Firebase · Clean Architecture · AI Integration · Google Play published.</p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="#projects" class="btn btn-primary">
        <svg width="16" height="16" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M9 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg>
        View Projects
      </a>
      <a href="#" class="btn btn-outline" download>
        <svg width="16" height="16" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M4 16v2a2 2 0 002 2h12a2 2 0 002-2v-2M7 10l5 5 5-5M12 15V3"/></svg>
        Download CV
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-right">
    <div class="avatar-wrap">
      <div class="avatar-ripple"></div>
      <div class="avatar-ripple"></div>
      <div class="avatar-ripple"></div>
      <div class="avatar-photo-frame">
        <div class="avatar-glow-ring"></div>
        <div class="avatar-photo-border">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Ahmed Mostafa Megahed" class="avatar-photo-img" />
        </div>
        <div class="avatar-status-badge">
          <span class="avatar-status-dot"></span>
          Available
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-hint">
    <span>Scroll</span>
    <div class="scroll-hint-line"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- MARQUEE -->
<div class="marquee-wrap" style="position:relative;z-index:1;">
  <div class="marquee-track" id="marqueeTrack">
    <div class="marquee-item"><span class="marquee-dot"></span>Flutter</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><span class="marquee-dot"></span>Dart</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><span class="marquee-dot"></span>Firebase</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><span class="marquee-dot"></span>BLoC / Cubit</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><span class="marquee-dot"></span>MVVM</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><span class="marquee-dot"></span>REST APIs</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><span class="marquee-dot"></span>Dio</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><span class="marquee-dot"></span>Clean Architecture</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><span class="marquee-dot"></span>Hive</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><span class="marquee-dot"></span>Provider</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><span class="marquee-dot"></span>Git & GitHub</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><span class="marquee-dot"></span>Postman</div>
    <!-- duplicate for seamless -->
    <div class="marquee-item"><span class="marquee-dot"></span>Flutter</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><span class="marquee-dot"></span>Dart</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><span class="marquee-dot"></span>Firebase</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><span class="marquee-dot"></span>BLoC / Cubit</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><span class="marquee-dot"></span>MVVM</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><span class="marquee-dot"></span>REST APIs</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><span class="marquee-dot"></span>Dio</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><span class="marquee-dot"></span>Clean Architecture</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><span class="marquee-dot"></span>Hive</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><span class="marquee-dot"></span>Provider</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><span class="marquee-dot"></span>Git & GitHub</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><span class="marquee-dot"></span>Postman</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="about-text reveal slide-left">
    <p class="section-label">// about me</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">Crafting Digital<br>Experiences</h2>
    <div class="divider"></div>
    <p>Flutter Developer with 6+ real-world projects delivered using Firebase, REST APIs, and Clean Architecture. I build mobile applications that scale well, perform flawlessly, and look exceptional.</p>
    <p>Currently pursuing Computer & Software Engineering at MUST, I blend academic foundations with hands-on project experience — and share everything I learn through content creation.</p>
    <div class="about-highlights">
      <div class="highlight-item reveal fade-up">
        <div class="highlight-icon">🧠</div>
        <div>
          <h4>Problem Solving Mindset</h4>
          <p>I approach every challenge analytically, finding elegant solutions that balance performance and maintainability.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="highlight-item reveal fade-up" style="transition-delay:.15s">
        <div class="highlight-icon">📐</div>
        <div>
          <h4>Scalable Architecture</h4>
          <p>Strong focus on Clean Architecture, SOLID principles, and patterns that grow with the product.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="highlight-item reveal fade-up" style="transition-delay:.3s">
        <div class="highlight-icon">✨</div>
        <div>
          <h4>UI/UX Attention</h4>
          <p>Every pixel matters. I craft interfaces that users love, with smooth animations and intuitive flows.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="about-visual reveal slide-right">
    <div class="about-card-3d" id="card3d">
      <div class="ac-header">
        <div class="ac-avatar" style="overflow:hidden;padding:0;background:none;"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center 15%;" alt="Ahmed"/></div>
        <div>
          <div class="ac-name">Ahmed Megahed</div>
          <div class="ac-role">Flutter Dev · Mobile App Dev</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="height:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);margin-bottom:1.2rem;"></div>
      <div style="font-size:.8rem;color:#9098b8;margin-bottom:.4rem;">📍 Giza, Egypt</div>
      <div style="font-size:.8rem;color:#9098b8;margin-bottom:1rem;">🎓 MUST · Eng. GPA 3.45</div>
      <div class="ac-stats">
        <div class="ac-stat">
          <div class="ac-stat-val">8+</div>
          <div class="ac-stat-label">Projects</div>
        </div>
        <div class="ac-stat">
          <div class="ac-stat-val">1</div>
          <div class="ac-stat-label">App Published</div>
        </div>
        <div class="ac-stat">
          <div class="ac-stat-val">1K+</div>
          <div class="ac-stat-label">Followers</div>
        </div>
        <div class="ac-stat">
          <div class="ac-stat-val">3.45</div>
          <div class="ac-stat-label">GPA</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="ac-tags">
        <span class="ac-tag">Flutter</span>
        <span class="ac-tag">Firebase</span>
        <span class="ac-tag">AI APIs</span>
        <span class="ac-tag">Published</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SKILLS -->
<section id="skills">
  <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:3.5rem;" class="reveal fade-up">
    <p class="section-label" style="text-align:center;">// expertise</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">Technical Skills</h2>
    <div class="divider" style="margin:1rem auto 0;"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="skills-grid">
    <!-- Core -->
    <div class="skill-category reveal slide-left">
      <div class="skill-cat-title"><span>⚡</span> Core</div>
      <div class="skill-cat-sub">Primary technologies I build with daily</div>
      <div class="skill-item">
        <div class="skill-header"><span class="skill-name">Flutter</span><span class="skill-pct">95%</span></div>
        <div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-bar" data-width="95"></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-item">
        <div class="skill-header"><span class="skill-name">Dart (Null Safety)</span><span class="skill-pct">92%</span></div>
        <div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-bar" data-width="92"></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-item">
        <div class="skill-header"><span class="skill-name">Firebase</span><span class="skill-pct">85%</span></div>
        <div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-bar" data-width="85"></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Architecture -->
    <div class="skill-category reveal fade-up" style="transition-delay:.15s">
      <div class="skill-cat-title"><span>🏗️</span> Architecture</div>
      <div class="skill-cat-sub">Patterns for scalable & maintainable apps</div>
      <div class="skill-item">
        <div class="skill-header"><span class="skill-name">BLoC / Cubit</span><span class="skill-pct">90%</span></div>
        <div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-bar" data-width="90"></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-item">
        <div class="skill-header"><span class="skill-name">Clean Architecture</span><span class="skill-pct">85%</span></div>
        <div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-bar" data-width="85"></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-item">
        <div class="skill-header"><span class="skill-name">MVVM</span><span class="skill-pct">88%</span></div>
        <div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-bar" data-width="88"></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-item">
        <div class="skill-header"><span class="skill-name">Provider / DI</span><span class="skill-pct">82%</span></div>
        <div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-bar" data-width="82"></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Networking -->
    <div class="skill-category reveal slide-right" style="transition-delay:.3s">
      <div class="skill-cat-title"><span>🌐</span> Networking & Data</div>
      <div class="skill-cat-sub">APIs, AI integrations & storage</div>
      <div class="skill-item">
        <div class="skill-header"><span class="skill-name">REST APIs (Dio/Retrofit)</span><span class="skill-pct">88%</span></div>
        <div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-bar" data-width="88"></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-item">
        <div class="skill-header"><span class="skill-name">Groq AI API (LLaMA 3.3)</span><span class="skill-pct">78%</span></div>
        <div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-bar" data-width="78"></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-item">
        <div class="skill-header"><span class="skill-name">Hive / Shared Prefs</span><span class="skill-pct">83%</span></div>
        <div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-bar" data-width="83"></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-item">
        <div class="skill-header"><span class="skill-name">Git & GitHub</span><span class="skill-pct">86%</span></div>
        <div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-bar" data-width="86"></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-item">
        <div class="skill-header"><span class="skill-name">Postman</span><span class="skill-pct">80%</span></div>
        <div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-bar" data-width="80"></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- UI & Device Skills -->
    <div class="skill-category reveal slide-left" style="transition-delay:.15s">
      <div class="skill-cat-title"><span>🎨</span> UI & Device</div>
      <div class="skill-cat-sub">Rich interfaces and native device features</div>
      <div class="skill-item">
        <div class="skill-header"><span class="skill-name">Responsive UI / Dark-Light Mode</span><span class="skill-pct">90%</span></div>
        <div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-bar" data-width="90"></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-item">
        <div class="skill-header"><span class="skill-name">RTL (Arabic / English)</span><span class="skill-pct">85%</span></div>
        <div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-bar" data-width="85"></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-item">
        <div class="skill-header"><span class="skill-name">Google Maps SDK</span><span class="skill-pct">80%</span></div>
        <div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-bar" data-width="80"></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-item">
        <div class="skill-header"><span class="skill-name">Audioplayers / Speech-to-Text</span><span class="skill-pct">78%</span></div>
        <div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-bar" data-width="78"></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Collaboration -->
    <div class="skill-category reveal slide-right" style="transition-delay:.3s">
      <div class="skill-cat-title"><span>🤝</span> Collaboration</div>
      <div class="skill-cat-sub">Team workflows and professional tools</div>
      <div class="skill-item">
        <div class="skill-header"><span class="skill-name">Agile Development</span><span class="skill-pct">82%</span></div>
        <div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-bar" data-width="82"></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-item">
        <div class="skill-header"><span class="skill-name">Git / GitHub</span><span class="skill-pct">86%</span></div>
        <div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-bar" data-width="86"></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-item">
        <div class="skill-header"><span class="skill-name">Android Studio / VS Code</span><span class="skill-pct">88%</span></div>
        <div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-bar" data-width="88"></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-item">
        <div class="skill-header"><span class="skill-name">Google Play Publishing</span><span class="skill-pct">75%</span></div>
        <div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-bar" data-width="75"></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EXPERIENCE -->
<section id="experience" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(79,142,255,0.03),transparent,rgba(162,89,255,0.03));">
  <div class="reveal fade-up" style="margin-bottom:3.5rem;">
    <p class="section-label">// work experience</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">Internship<br>Experience</h2>
    <div class="divider"></div>
    <p class="section-sub">Real-world delivery under professional conditions — not just side projects.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="timeline" style="max-width:780px;">
    <div class="timeline-item reveal fade-up">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;margin-bottom:.8rem;">
        <div>
          <div class="tl-year">2026</div>
          <div class="tl-title">Mobile App Development Intern</div>
          <div class="tl-sub">Uneeq Interns · App Development Track</div>
        </div>
        <span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;padding:.35rem 1rem;border-radius:100px;background:rgba(255,180,0,0.12);border:1px solid rgba(255,180,0,0.3);color:#f5c518;font-size:.75rem;font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;">
          🏆 Best Intern — May 2026
        </span>
      </div>
      <ul style="list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.6rem;margin-top:.5rem;">
        <li style="display:flex;gap:.7rem;align-items:flex-start;font-size:.88rem;color:#9098b8;">
          <span style="color:var(--neon);flex-shrink:0;margin-top:.1rem;">▸</span>
          Designed and shipped two production-quality Flutter apps (QuizMaster & AI To-Do) as structured internship deliverables.
        </li>
        <li style="display:flex;gap:.7rem;align-items:flex-start;font-size:.88rem;color:#9098b8;">
          <span style="color:var(--neon);flex-shrink:0;margin-top:.1rem;">▸</span>
          Applied Firebase, REST APIs, Groq AI API (LLaMA 3.3 70B), and Speech-to-Text following Clean Architecture throughout.
        </li>
        <li style="display:flex;gap:.7rem;align-items:flex-start;font-size:.88rem;color:#9098b8;">
          <span style="color:var(--neon);flex-shrink:0;margin-top:.1rem;">▸</span>
          Demonstrated Agile development practices and consistent delivery — earning Best Intern of the Month recognition.
        </li>
      </ul>
      <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.4rem;margin-top:1.2rem;">
        <span class="tag">Flutter</span><span class="tag">Firebase</span><span class="tag">Groq AI</span><span class="tag">Speech-to-Text</span><span class="tag">Clean Architecture</span><span class="tag">Agile</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PROJECTS -->
<section id="projects">
  <div class="reveal fade-up" style="margin-bottom:3.5rem;">
    <p class="section-label">// portfolio</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">Featured Projects</h2>
    <div class="divider"></div>
    <p class="section-sub">Real-world applications built with clean code, modern architecture and thoughtful UX.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="projects-grid">

    <!-- 01 — Siratic (PUBLISHED — highlight badge) -->
    <div class="project-card reveal slide-left" style="border-color:rgba(34,197,94,0.25);">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:.2rem;">
        <div class="project-num">01 / 08</div>
        <span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.35rem;padding:.2rem .7rem;border-radius:100px;background:rgba(34,197,94,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.3);color:#22c55e;font-size:.68rem;font-weight:700;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;">
          ● PUBLISHED
        </span>
      </div>
      <h3 class="project-title">Siratic App</h3>
      <p class="project-desc">Islamic utility app published on Google Play Store. Features prayer times with Adhan audio, Hijri calendar, onboarding flow, carousel UX, and background audio support.</p>
      <div class="project-tags">
        <span class="tag">Provider</span><span class="tag">Adhan</span><span class="tag">Audioplayers</span><span class="tag">Shared Prefs</span><span class="tag">Google Play</span>
      </div>
      <a href="https://github.com/ahmedmostafa361/Islami-app/tree/develop" target="_blank" class="project-link">
        View on GitHub <svg width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M10 6H6a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2 2 0 002 2h10a2 2 0 002-2v-4M14 4h6m0 0v6m0-6L10 14"/></svg>
      </a>
    </div>

    <!-- 02 — Evently -->
    <div class="project-card reveal slide-right" style="transition-delay:.1s">
      <div class="project-num">02 / 08</div>
      <h3 class="project-title">Evently App</h3>
      <p class="project-desc">Full-stack event management platform with Google Sign-In, real-time Firestore sync, turn-by-turn Google Maps navigation, auto-location detection, Dark/Light mode, and Arabic/English RTL support.</p>
      <div class="project-tags">
        <span class="tag">Firebase</span><span class="tag">Google Maps</span><span class="tag">Geolocator</span><span class="tag">RTL</span><span class="tag">Clean Arch</span>
      </div>
      <a href="https://github.com/ahmedmostafa361/Eventely_app/tree/develop" target="_blank" class="project-link">
        View on GitHub <svg width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M10 6H6a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2 2 0 002 2h10a2 2 0 002-2v-4M14 4h6m0 0v6m0-6L10 14"/></svg>
      </a>
    </div>

    <!-- 03 — QuizMaster (Internship) -->
    <div class="project-card reveal slide-left" style="transition-delay:.2s;border-color:rgba(162,89,255,0.2);">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:.2rem;">
        <div class="project-num">03 / 08</div>
        <span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.35rem;padding:.2rem .7rem;border-radius:100px;background:rgba(162,89,255,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(162,89,255,0.25);color:var(--neon2);font-size:.68rem;font-weight:700;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;">
          INTERNSHIP
        </span>
      </div>
      <h3 class="project-title">QuizMaster</h3>
      <p class="project-desc">Category-based quiz app with 15-second timed questions, Easy/Medium/Hard difficulty filtering, real-time Firestore result tracking, and a weekly progress dashboard.</p>
      <div class="project-tags">
        <span class="tag">Firebase</span><span class="tag">Firestore</span><span class="tag">Provider</span><span class="tag">Google Sign-In</span><span class="tag">Clean Arch</span>
      </div>
      <a href="https://github.com/ahmedmostafa361/quiz_app_flutter" target="_blank" class="project-link">
        View on GitHub <svg width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M10 6H6a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2 2 0 002 2h10a2 2 0 002-2v-4M14 4h6m0 0v6m0-6L10 14"/></svg>
      </a>
    </div>

    <!-- 04 — AI To-Do App (Internship) -->
    <div class="project-card reveal slide-right" style="transition-delay:.3s;border-color:rgba(162,89,255,0.2);">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:.2rem;">
        <div class="project-num">04 / 08</div>
        <span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.35rem;padding:.2rem .7rem;border-radius:100px;background:rgba(162,89,255,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(162,89,255,0.25);color:var(--neon2);font-size:.68rem;font-weight:700;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;">
          INTERNSHIP · AI
        </span>
      </div>
      <h3 class="project-title">AI To-Do App</h3>
      <p class="project-desc">Voice & AI-powered task manager integrating Groq API (LLaMA 3.3 70B) for AI-generated task summaries and smart tag auto-labelling. Voice-to-task creation via Speech-to-Text with animated progress bar.</p>
      <div class="project-tags">
        <span class="tag">Groq AI</span><span class="tag">LLaMA 3.3</span><span class="tag">Speech-to-Text</span><span class="tag">Provider</span><span class="tag">Clean Arch</span>
      </div>
      <a href="#" class="project-link" style="opacity:.5;pointer-events:none;">
        Private Repo <svg width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M10 6H6a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2 2 0 002 2h10a2 2 0 002-2v-4M14 4h6m0 0v6m0-6L10 14"/></svg>
      </a>
    </div>

    <!-- 05 — E-Commerce -->
    <div class="project-card reveal slide-left" style="transition-delay:.1s">
      <div class="project-num">05 / 08</div>
      <h3 class="project-title">E-Commerce App</h3>
      <p class="project-desc">Scalable mobile e-commerce app with MVVM architecture, dynamic product listing via Retrofit, and real-time cart management through RESTful API integration.</p>
      <div class="project-tags">
        <span class="tag">MVVM</span><span class="tag">Dio</span><span class="tag">Retrofit</span><span class="tag">REST APIs</span>
      </div>
      <a href="#" class="project-link">
        View on GitHub <svg width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M10 6H6a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2 2 0 002 2h10a2 2 0 002-2v-4M14 4h6m0 0v6m0-6L10 14"/></svg>
      </a>
    </div>

    <!-- 06 — News App -->
    <div class="project-card reveal slide-right" style="transition-delay:.2s">
      <div class="project-num">06 / 08</div>
      <h3 class="project-title">News App</h3>
      <p class="project-desc">News aggregator with offline-first approach. BLoC state management and Hive-based offline caching keep users informed even without connectivity.</p>
      <div class="project-tags">
        <span class="tag">BLoC</span><span class="tag">Hive</span><span class="tag">Dio</span><span class="tag">Offline</span>
      </div>
      <a href="https://github.com/ahmedmostafa361/news_app" target="_blank" class="project-link">
        View on GitHub <svg width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M10 6H6a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2 2 0 002 2h10a2 2 0 002-2v-4M14 4h6m0 0v6m0-6L10 14"/></svg>
      </a>
    </div>

    <!-- 07 — Movies App (Team) -->
    <div class="project-card reveal slide-left" style="transition-delay:.3s">
      <div class="project-num">07 / 08</div>
      <h3 class="project-title">Movies App</h3>
      <p class="project-desc">Team-built movie discovery app using external movie APIs for dynamic content fetching. Collaborated in an Agile team workflow using Git branching strategies.</p>
      <div class="project-tags">
        <span class="tag">REST API</span><span class="tag">Dio</span><span class="tag">Team Project</span><span class="tag">Agile</span>
      </div>
      <a href="https://github.com/ahmedsukkary52-cmd/movies_app/tree/developer" target="_blank" class="project-link">
        View on GitHub <svg width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M10 6H6a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2 2 0 002 2h10a2 2 0 002-2v-4M14 4h6m0 0v6m0-6L10 14"/></svg>
      </a>
    </div>

    <!-- 08 — Islami / Quran App -->
    <div class="project-card reveal slide-right" style="transition-delay:.4s">
      <div class="project-num">08 / 08</div>
      <h3 class="project-title">Islami App</h3>
      <p class="project-desc">Feature-rich Islamic companion app with Quran reader, reciter audio player, radio streaming, dhikr counter, Hadiths, Azkar, and prayer times. Fully responsive with luxury UI.</p>
      <div class="project-tags">
        <span class="tag">Provider</span><span class="tag">Audioplayers</span><span class="tag">Local Storage</span><span class="tag">Flutter</span>
      </div>
      <a href="#" class="project-link">
        View on GitHub <svg width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M10 6H6a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2 2 0 002 2h10a2 2 0 002-2v-4M14 4h6m0 0v6m0-6L10 14"/></svg>

    </div>

  </div>
</section>

</section>

        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/ahmed-mostafa-041690375" target="_blank" class="social-btn">
          <span class="social-icon">
            <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M20.447 20.452h-3.554v-5.569c0-1.328-.027-3.037-1.852-3.037-1.853 0-2.136 1.445-2.136 2.939v5.667H9.351V9h3.414v1.561h.046c.477-.9 1.637-1.85 3.37-1.85 3.601 0 4.267 2.37 4.267 5.455v6.286zM5.337 7.433a2.062 2.062 0 01-2.063-2.065 2.064 2.064 0 112.063 2.065zm1.782 13.019H3.555V9h3.564v11.452zM22.225 0H1.771C.792 0 0 .774 0 1.729v20.542C0 23.227.792 24 1.771 24h20.451C23.2 24 24 23.227 24 22.271V1.729C24 .774 23.2 0 22.222 0h.003z"/></svg>
          </span>
          LinkedIn
        </a>
        <a href="https://youtube.com" target="_blank" class="social-btn">
          <span class="social-icon" style="color:#ff0000;">
            <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M23.495 6.205a3.007 3.007 0 00-2.088-2.088c-1.87-.501-9.396-.501-9.396-.501s-7.507-.01-9.396.501A3.007 3.007 0 00.527 6.205a31.247 31.247 0 00-.522 5.805 31.247 31.247 0 00.522 5.783 3.007 3.007 0 002.088 2.088c1.868.502 9.396.502 9.396.502s7.506 0 9.396-.502a3.007 3.007 0 002.088-2.088 31.247 31.247 0 00.5-5.783 31.247 31.247 0 00-.5-5.805zM9.609 15.601V8.408l6.264 3.602z"/></svg>
          </span>
          YouTube
        </a>
        <a href="https://tiktok.com" target="_blank" class="social-btn">
          <span class="social-icon">
            <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M19.59 6.69a4.83 4.83 0 01-3.77-4.25V2h-3.45v13.67a2.89 2.89 0 01-2.88 2.5 2.89 2.89 0 01-2.89-2.89 2.89 2.89 0 012.89-2.89c.28 0 .54.04.79.1V9.01a6.3 6.3 0 00-.79-.05 6.34 6.34 0 00-6.34 6.34 6.34 6.34 0 006.34 6.34 6.34 6.34 0 006.33-6.34V9.13a8.27 8.27 0 004.84 1.55V7.23a4.85 4.85 0 01-1.07-.54z"/></svg>
          </span>
          TikTok
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <p>Designed & built by <span>Ahmed Mostafa Megahed</span> · <span>Flutter Developer</span></p>
  <p style="margin-top:.5rem;font-size:.75rem;color:#4a5068;">© 2025 · All rights reserved</p>
</footer>

<!-- BACK TO TOP -->
<button id="back-top" onclick="window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'})" aria-label="Back to top">
  <svg width="18" height="18" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="white" stroke-width="2.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M5 15l7-7 7 7"/></svg>
</button>

<script>
// ── LOADER ──
window.addEventListener('load',()=>{
  setTimeout(()=>{document.getElementById('loader').classList.add('hide');},2200);
});

// ── CURSOR ──
const cur=document.getElementById('cursor');
const curR=document.getElementById('cursor-ring');
let mx=0,my=0,rx=0,ry=0;
document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{
  mx=e.clientX;my=e.clientY;
  cur.style.left=mx+'px';cur.style.top=my+'px';
});
function animRing(){
  rx+=(mx-rx)*.15;ry+=(my-ry)*.15;
  curR.style.left=rx+'px';curR.style.top=ry+'px';
  requestAnimationFrame(animRing);
}animRing();
document.querySelectorAll('a,button,.highlight-item,.project-card,.platform-card,.cert-card,.contact-item,.social-btn,.skill-category,.about-card-3d,.marquee-item').forEach(el=>{
  el.addEventListener('mouseenter',()=>document.body.classList.add('hovering'));
  el.addEventListener('mouseleave',()=>document.body.classList.remove('hovering'));
});

// ── PARTICLES ──
const canvas=document.getElementById('particles');
const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');
let W,H,particles=[];
function resize(){W=canvas.width=window.innerWidth;H=canvas.height=window.innerHeight;}
resize();window.addEventListener('resize',()=>{resize();initP();});

class Particle{
  constructor(){this.reset();}
  reset(){
    this.x=Math.random()*W;this.y=Math.random()*H;
    this.vx=(Math.random()-.5)*.4;this.vy=(Math.random()-.5)*.4;
    this.r=Math.random()*1.5+.5;this.alpha=Math.random()*.5+.1;
    this.color=Math.random()>.5?'79,142,255':'162,89,255';
  }
  update(){
    this.x+=this.vx;this.y+=this.vy;
    if(this.x<0||this.x>W||this.y<0||this.y>H)this.reset();
  }
  draw(){
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(this.x,this.y,this.r,0,Math.PI*2);
    ctx.fillStyle=`rgba(${this.color},${this.alpha})`;ctx.fill();
  }
}
function initP(){particles=[];for(let i=0;i<80;i++)particles.push(new Particle());}
initP();

let mouseX=W/2,mouseY=H/2;
document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{mouseX=e.clientX;mouseY=e.clientY;});

function drawParticles(){
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);
  particles.forEach(p=>{p.update();p.draw();});
  for(let i=0;i<particles.length;i++){
    for(let j=i+1;j<particles.length;j++){
      const dx=particles[i].x-particles[j].x,dy=particles[i].y-particles[j].y;
      const d=Math.sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy);
      if(d<120){
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(particles[i].x,particles[i].y);
        ctx.lineTo(particles[j].x,particles[j].y);
        ctx.strokeStyle=`rgba(79,142,255,${(1-d/120)*.15})`;
        ctx.lineWidth=.5;ctx.stroke();
      }
    }
    const dx=particles[i].x-mouseX,dy=particles[i].y-mouseY;
    const d=Math.sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy);
    if(d<150){
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(particles[i].x,particles[i].y);
      ctx.lineTo(mouseX,mouseY);
      ctx.strokeStyle=`rgba(162,89,255,${(1-d/150)*.3})`;
      ctx.lineWidth=.6;ctx.stroke();
    }
  }
  requestAnimationFrame(drawParticles);
}drawParticles();

// ── NAVBAR ──
const navbar=document.getElementById('navbar');
const sections=document.querySelectorAll('section[id]');
const navLinks=document.querySelectorAll('.nav-links a');
window.addEventListener('scroll',()=>{
  // back to top
  document.getElementById('back-top').classList.toggle('visible',window.scrollY>400);
  // active link
  let current='';
  sections.forEach(s=>{if(window.scrollY>=s.offsetTop-200)current=s.id;});
  navLinks.forEach(a=>{a.classList.toggle('active',a.getAttribute('href')==='#'+current);});
});

// hamburger
document.getElementById('hamburger').addEventListener('click',()=>{
  document.getElementById('navLinks').classList.toggle('open');
});
document.querySelectorAll('.nav-links a').forEach(a=>{
  a.addEventListener('click',()=>document.getElementById('navLinks').classList.remove('open'));
});

// ── SCROLL REVEAL ──
const revealEls=document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
const revealObs=new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{
  entries.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.classList.add('visible');revealObs.unobserve(e.target);}});
},{threshold:.12});
revealEls.forEach(el=>revealObs.observe(el));

// ── SKILL BARS ──
const skillBars=document.querySelectorAll('.skill-bar');
const barObs=new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{
  entries.forEach(e=>{
    if(e.isIntersecting){
      e.target.style.width=e.target.dataset.width+'%';
      barObs.unobserve(e.target);
    }
  });
},{threshold:.5});
skillBars.forEach(b=>barObs.observe(b));

// ── 3D CARD ──
const card3d=document.getElementById('card3d');
if(card3d){
  document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{
    const rect=card3d.getBoundingClientRect();
    const cx=rect.left+rect.width/2,cy=rect.top+rect.height/2;
    const dx=e.clientX-cx,dy=e.clientY-cy;
    const maxRot=12;
    const rotX=(-dy/cy*maxRot).toFixed(1);
    const rotY=(dx/cx*maxRot).toFixed(1);
    card3d.style.transform=`perspective(800px) rotateX(${rotX}deg) rotateY(${rotY}deg) translateZ(10px)`;
  });
  card3d.addEventListener('mouseleave',()=>{
    card3d.style.transform='perspective(800px) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(0deg) translateZ(0)';
  });
}

// ── COUNTERS ──
function animCounter(el,target,suffix=''){
  let current=0;
  const step=Math.ceil(target/60);
  const timer=setInterval(()=>{
    current=Math.min(current+step,target);
    el.textContent=current.toLocaleString()+suffix;
    if(current>=target)clearInterval(timer);
  },30);
}
const counterObs=new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{
  entries.forEach(e=>{
    if(e.isIntersecting){
      const el=e.target;
      animCounter(el,parseInt(el.dataset.target),el.id==='c1'?'+':'');
      counterObs.unobserve(el);
    }
  });
},{threshold:.5});
document.querySelectorAll('[data-target]').forEach(el=>counterObs.observe(el));

// ── COPY TO CLIPBOARD ──
function copyToClipboard(e,text){
  e.preventDefault();e.stopPropagation();
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(()=>{
    const btn=e.currentTarget;
    btn.textContent='✓ Copied';btn.classList.add('copied');
    setTimeout(()=>{btn.textContent='Copy';btn.classList.remove('copied');},2000);
  });
}
window.copyToClipboard=copyToClipboard;
</script>
</body>
</html>
